latex:
Ethan and his family are visiting family in another part of the country. They decided that they would take the scenic route, taking a three-day road trip.

\begin{itemize}
\item On Monday they drove at an average speed of $55$ mph for $5$ hours.
\item On Tuesday they drove at an average speed of $40$ mph for $7$ hours.
\item On Wednesday they drove at an average speed of $45$ mph for $4$ hours.
\end{itemize}

What was the total distance traveled?
